text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head to the dance studio at King Halo's request.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Today, you shall have the privilege of watching
my royal dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You'll see first-rate dancing up close and
personal, so you better appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One, two, three! ♪ One, two, three! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're supposed to chant "King" here, okay?
Aaaaand, go!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Not "huh"! Do the chant!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A first-rate chant helps liven up the whole
audience at a concert.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if we're just practicing—I want it
to feel like the real thing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Otherwise, this is a waste of time.
choice_data_list:
I see what you mean, but it might be a little
difficult...

I see what you mean, but it might be a little
difficult...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose it is unreasonable to expect you
to create the atmosphere of a concert all by
yourself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if we should invite some younger
students to help set the right mood...
choice_data_list: Then it would be just like the real thing!

Don't worry. I can belt out that chant with the
power of an entire audience!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That settles it. The more cheers there are, the
more exciting it will be!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One, two, three! ♪ One, two, three! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King! ♪ King! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! That's more like it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now to show you a first-rate dance!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! ☆ King is number one!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, everyone join in and make it even more
exciting!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You've been granted the privilege of dancing
beside your king! Come forth!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, the dance lesson becomes a
dance party, but it's effective nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now then, let's push this dance to the limit!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One, two, three! ♪ One, two, three! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Time for the chant!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Once more, with more gusto! Stay in time with the
beat!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm speeding up the tempo now, so make sure to
keep up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohohoho! Feast your eyes on this first-rate
dance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's dance is truly a lively and energizing
experience.
